title: glaucium corniculatum
intro: Glaucium corniculatum, also known as hornpoppy or horned poppy, is a perennial plant species native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects due to the presence of alkaloids such as glaucine and reticuline. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and may also have antimicrobial properties. Glaucium corniculatum is used in herbal preparations, including tinctures and infusions, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and side effects.
